HeroC.badge: Grow Your Business with AI Program
HeroC.subtitle: We don't teach AI tools — we show you how to grow your business with AI. Tailored to your industry, at your own pace.
HeroC.supportingText: Six months ago, you'd have paid agencies thousands to grow your business. Now you can do the same yourself with AI — and far faster. Take your first step in just 4 weeks.
HeroC.ctaSecondary: How Does the GROWT Method Work?

FAQC.faq1Q: AI isn't my field and it feels too technical. Can I really do this?
FAQC.faq1A: No technical background needed. We don't teach you AI tools — we show you how to grow your business with AI.
FAQC.faq2Q: How much time do I need to commit each week?
FAQC.faq2A: You move at your own pace. Saving you time is the whole point. But the more time you put in, the more progress you'll see.
FAQC.faq3Q: Can't I just learn this for free on YouTube?
FAQC.faq3A: YouTube gives you scattered, general knowledge. We guide you through a structured process for growing your business. But your results come down to how you apply it — even the best process means nothing if you don't put it into action.
FAQC.faq4Q: How long does the program last?
FAQC.faq4A: 4 weeks of access. You move at your own pace. We give you the process — you set the speed.
FAQC.faq5Q: I have no online presence at all — can I still join?
FAQC.faq5A: Yes. You don't need to be online already. Start from zero — but your progress depends on the steps you take. We're right beside you, but you're the one walking.
FAQC.faq6Q: Which industries do you work with?
FAQC.faq6A: Every industry. You'll work through examples and applications tailored to your sector. You learn the logic, then you apply it to your own business.
FAQC.faq7A: You'll have built the right mindset and completed your first application. If you want to keep going, there are extended program options. But how far you get in 4 weeks is entirely up to you.

CTAC.heading: Ready to transform and grow your business with AI?
CTAC.subheading: Be among the first in your field to use AI. Start your transformation with the GROWT Method.

ProblemSectionC.heading: You want to grow your business, but...
ProblemSectionC.knowledgeDescription: AI is everywhere, but there's no roadmap tailored to you. Generic content doesn't get results.
ProblemSectionC.timeSubtitle: And that's exactly why you need it —
ProblemSectionC.timeDescription: You're already busy. Yet you spend 10-15 hours every week on repetitive tasks. AI gives that time back to you.
ProblemSectionC.costDescription: Agency fees run into thousands every month. With AI you can do the same yourself — but you need the right guidance.
ProblemSectionC.closing: And every month you wait, your losses in time, money, and customers keep growing.

ProcessSupportC.subtitle: You're not alone — there's support at every step.
ProcessSupportC.progressTrackingDescription: What level you're at, which step you've completed, what's ahead — all on a clear, visible progress map.
ProcessSupportC.phaseCompletionDescription: Every level you finish is a milestone. The next phase unlocks, and your transformation moves one step further.
ProcessSupportC.communitySupportDescription: Q&A, inspiration, and mutual motivation with professionals on the same journey. You're not on your own.
ProcessSupportC.whatsappSupportDescription: Instant help whenever you get stuck. Ask your questions and get guidance over WhatsApp — you're not on your own.

LevelProgressC.heading: 5 Levels, Transformation at Your Own Pace
LevelProgressC.subheading: Complete the modules and unlock the next level. No minimum time — if you learn fast, you move fast.

GROWTStepsC.subtitle: Not a "what is AI" course — a structured process to grow your business.

SectorGridC.subheading: Every industry has different needs. The GROWT Method adapts to your business.

TestimonialsC.subtitle: Professionals growing their business with the GROWT Method
TestimonialsC.testimonial1Text: Building a custom program for every client used to take me days. Now I put together a personalized program in 30 minutes with AI — and I doubled my client count in 3 months.
TestimonialsC.testimonial2Text: I was paying an agency $1,000 a month and didn't even fully know what they were doing. Now I handle everything myself, from content creation to client follow-up — better results, and the whole process is under my control.
TestimonialsC.testimonial3Text: Juggling five clients' work at once was impossible. With AI I systematized proposals, project tracking, and client communication — now I comfortably work with eight clients.

KurumsalSectorsC.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about solutions tailored to your industry

KurumsalServicesC.mentorshipDescription: We teach, your team applies. Not an AI course — a structured mentorship process that shows you how to grow your business.
KurumsalServicesC.appDescription: Your team has built the right mindset with GROWT. Now put what you've learned into action with Growtify.app.

HakkimizdaPage.metaDescription: Growtify.ai — the consulting platform that guides individual professionals and small businesses through their AI transformation.
HakkimizdaPage.heroTitleHighlight: we show you how to grow your business with AI
HakkimizdaPage.heroSubtitle: Growtify.ai guides individual professionals and small businesses through AI transformation with the GROWT Method. A 5-level, industry-specific, structured business-growth program. A process, not a course — application, not theory.
HakkimizdaPage.missionParagraph1: The vast majority of businesses haven't yet integrated AI into their operations. Those who use it systematically gain a clear productivity advantage over their competitors. For most of those still standing still, the reason is the same: “I don't know how to do it.” That application gap is exactly where Growtify.ai focuses.
HakkimizdaPage.missionParagraph2: Six months ago, growing your business meant paying agencies tens of thousands. Now, with AI, you can do the same yourself — and far faster.
HakkimizdaPage.missionParagraph3: We don't sell AI courses. We give you an industry-specific, structured process for growing your business. We provide the process — your own application determines the outcome.
HakkimizdaPage.visionParagraph: To become the leading AI transformation consultancy in our region — and to build a future where every professional grows their business with AI.
HakkimizdaPage.differentiationQuote: “Consulting, not a course. Application, not theory. Specific to your profession, not generic.”
HakkimizdaPage.valueResultsDescription: Application, not theory. At every step, we aim for measurable results.
HakkimizdaPage.valueAccessibleDescription: No technical jargon. In the language of professionals, in a way everyone can understand.
HakkimizdaPage.valueIndustryDescription: Not a generic AI course — a business-growth process tailored to your profession.
HakkimizdaPage.valueIndependenceDescription: Not dependence on us, but the power to grow your own business yourself.
HakkimizdaPage.ecosystemSubtitle: Three brands, one goal: the digital transformation of professionals and businesses.
HakkimizdaPage.ecosystemAiDescription: A 5-level AI transformation program. A structured, industry-specific business-growth process at your own pace. “You do it, with us by your side.”
HakkimizdaPage.ecosystemBusinessDescription: The enterprise adaptation of the GROWT Method. Team training, consulting, and AI automation — for growing businesses.
HakkimizdaPage.ecosystemAppDescription: A software and service model. AI-powered digital infrastructure, automation, and business solutions for companies. “We build it, you stay focused.”

GrowtMethodPage.metaDescription: A 5-level structured AI transformation program. At your own pace, tailored to your industry, with measurable results.
GrowtMethodPage.heroDescription: Not an AI course — a structured process to help you grow your business. Transform across 5 levels with the GROWT Method.
GrowtMethodPage.phasesSubheading: Each level builds on the one before it. A clear path from Gap Analysis all the way to Transform.
GrowtMethodPage.audienceSubheading: The GROWT Method is built for professionals who grow their business with their own hands.
GrowtMethodPage.audience1Description: Expert professionals running their own practice in fields like healthcare, law, beauty, and real estate.
GrowtMethodPage.audience2Description: Consultants, freelancers, coaches, and agency owners — professionals working independently and building their own brand.
GrowtMethodPage.audience3Description: Owners of businesses with 1-5 employees who want to multiply their capacity with AI — without growing their team.
GrowtMethodPage.howItWorksSubheading: A model that combines self-paced learning with advisor-supported progress.
GrowtMethodPage.howItWorks1Description: Complete the steps whenever and wherever you want. There's no fixed schedule — it fits into your life.
GrowtMethodPage.howItWorks2Description: Complete your task at the end of each step. The next step unlocks after your advisor's approval — a solid foundation, guaranteed.
GrowtMethodPage.howItWorks3Description: See your progress map, the stages you've completed, and your community support all in one place. Every step is visible, keeping your motivation going.
GrowtMethodPage.ctaSubheading: Choose the path that fits you best — the individual program or business solutions.
GrowtMethodPage.ctaIndividualDescription: One-time payment, 4 weeks of full access, progress at your own pace. Take the quiz to find out your personalized price.
GrowtMethodPage.ctaBusinessDescription: Team training, enterprise consulting, AI automation, and the enterprise adaptation of the GROWT Method. For growing businesses.
